SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ MELARA, MILAGRO Y. $973.35 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,068.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ MELARA, MILAGRO Y.
